variables.notes: R:c. Chosen the clean explicit current-maturity debt line and excluded lease-related rows per rule. Manual review because current debt may also be captured in one of the duplicate 'Liabilities to credit institutions' current rows, but the duplicated label structure makes the exact non-overlapping balance-sheet mapping uncertain.
